_comment: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Table 41.1 / 41.3 derived disconnection-time + Ia thresholds. Used by BS7671ComplianceEngine to verify Zs × Ia ≤ Uo within the required disconnection time.

TN-C-S.description: Combined neutral-earth at utility, split at consumer (PME)

_ia_comment: Multiplier × rated current (In) at which device operates within the disconnection time. From BS EN 60898-1 Type B/C/D characteristic curves.
_disconnect_comment: Maximum disconnection times (Table 41.1) by circuit type and earthing system. Final circuits ≤ 32 A: 0.4 s for TN, 0.2 s for TT. Distribution circuits + final >32 A: 5 s for TN, 1 s for TT.
_uo_comment: Phase-to-earth voltage Uo (V). 230 V single-phase TN; 240 V is also accepted for legacy installations.
_k_comment: Adiabatic constant k for (k·S)² ≥ I²·t check (BS 7671 §434.5.2 Table 43.1). 115=Cu/PVC, 143=Cu/XLPE (90°C), 76=Al/PVC, 94=Al/XLPE.
_rcd_comment: RCD/RCBO sensitivity tiers per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022. 30 mA mandatory for sockets ≤32 A in dwellings (Reg 411.3.4) and cables in walls <50 mm depth (Reg 522.6.202). 100 mA / 300 mA for distribution discrimination.
_disconnect_rcd_comment: RCD disconnection times: 30 mA must trip at 5×IΔn within 40 ms (BS EN 61008-1).
